title: ASR Outdoor Adjustable Ear Protection Ear Muffs for Gun Shooting Firing Range
description:
Avoid the uncomfortable ringing in your ears from loud noises or gun shots with the ASR Outdoor Adjustable Noise Protection Ear Muffs! A must-have for the firing range, when shooting or hunting in the field, at target practice or participating in gun shooting sport, these ear protection ear muffs were specifically designed to suppress loud noises and most importantly, protect your hearing. With an effective noise reduction rating (NRR) of 20 DB, these gun shooting ear muffs provide excellent noise reduction. The ear muffs also feature a comfortable and adjustable fit that are wearable for many hours at a time. The ear protection, noise reduction ear muffs also feature thick padded ear cups for maximum comfort

ASR Outdoor Adjustable Ear Protection Ear Muffs for Gun Shooting Firing Range

Avoid the uncomfortable ringing in your ears from loud noises or gun shots with the ASR Outdoor Adjustable Noise Protection Ear Muffs! A must-have for the firing range, when shooting or hunting in the field, at target practice or participating in gun shooting sport, these ear protection ear muffs were specifically designed to suppress loud noises and most importantly, protect your hearing.

Key Features

  • DESIGNED FOR SHOOTING: For use in the firing range or in the field, the ASR Outdoor Adjustable Noise Protection Ear Muffs were specifically designed to suppress shooting noise and protect hearing; low profile designed earcups won’t interfere when aiming or shooting
  • EFFECTIVE NOISE REDUCTION: The ear muffs provide effective noise protection when shooting indoors or outdoors with a noise reduction rating (NRR) of 20 DB
  • COMFORTABLE ADJUSTABLE FIT: Comfortable enough to wear for many hours at a time, these ear muffs for gun shooting feature thick padded earcups for maximum comfort; the adjustable headband makes these noise reduction ear muffs an easy fit for youth and adults; no pinching or skin compression
  • MUTLIPURPOSE EAR MUFFS: While these ear muffs are designed for shooting, they can also be used for lawn mowing, grinding, drilling, weed whacking, wood working, on commercial or residential construction sites and much more
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Material: ABS Plastic; Color: Green; Dimensions: 7.5 inches wide x 3.5 inches deep; NRR: 20 DB; Confirms to ANSI; Adjustable height cups; Weight: 6.3 ounces

Product Specifications

  • MPN: AO-55421
  • UPC: 810058481788
  • Color: Green
  • Size: Medium

With an effective noise reduction rating (NRR) of 20 DB, these gun shooting ear muffs provide excellent noise reduction. The ear muffs also feature a comfortable and adjustable fit that are wearable for many hours at a time. The ear protection, noise reduction ear muffs also feature thick padded ear cups for maximum comfort. The adjustable headband makes these noise reduction ear muffs an easy fit for youth and adults with no pinching or skin compression.

And, while the ear muffs for shooting are designed to be used for firing ranges or field shooting, they can also be used for lawn mowing, grinding, drilling, weed whacking, wood working, on commercial or residential construction sites and much more where noise reduction is a must.

Weighing only 0.39 pounds or 6.3 ounces, the ear protection ear muffs are lightweight and easy to tote with you to your next firing range session or outdoor shooting or hunting excursion. Stay safe and protect your hearing with the ASR Outdoor Adjustable Ear Protection Ear Muffs.
